TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-hunting3_Takun
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ulaqi kung sunga' ru rasun kuing ni yava'mu musa' i ragiyax musa' i sumku' su trap.
S.PHON: ulaqi kuŋ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru ras~ɕun kuiŋ ni ja*aʔmu mus~ɕaʔ i raɣijax mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu trap.
S.FORM: ulaqi kung sunga' ru rasun kuing ni yava'mu musa' i ragiyax musa' i sumku' su trap.
S.PHON: ulaqi kuŋ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru ras~ɕun kuiŋ ni ja*aʔmu mus~ɕaʔ i raɣijax mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu trap.
S.TRANSL: 以前我還是小孩的時候,我爸爸帶我去山上為了設置陷阱.
When I was a little child, my father brought me, and went to the mountain, and set

S.FORM: tuliq ru makatu ru makaspat ga halan mian i mitaal hani vay taruyqun ku qutux ku vauwak.
S.PHON: tuliq ru makatu ru makas~ɕpat ɣa ħalan mian i mitaal ħani *aj tarujqun ku qutux ku *auwak.
S.FORM: tuliq ru makatu ru makaspat ga halan mian i mitaal hani vay taruyqun ku qutux ku vauwak.
S.PHON: tuliq ru makatu ru makas~ɕpat ɣa ħalan mian i mitaal ħani *aj tarujqun ku qutux ku *auwak.
S.TRANSL: 然後,隔了三到四天我們去看,正吊到一隻山豬.

TRANSL.notes: And then, three or four days later, we went to see (the trap), and it was taking place that a hog was hung.

S.TRANSL: And then, three or four days later, we went to see , and it was taking place that a hog was hung.

S.FORM: havaw ta' maha sami.
S.PHON: ħa*aw taʔ maħa s~ɕami.
S.FORM: havaw ta' maha sami.
S.PHON: ħa*aw taʔ maħa s~ɕami.
S.TRANSL: 我們說我們來刺.

TRANSL.notes: We said that we came stabbing (it).

S.TRANSL: We said that we came stabbing .

S.FORM: havunniam ru maisu kung gi ulaqi kuing rumakiyas kuing gi kaisunmu ima kasaunia maha kuing.
S.PHON: ħa*unniam ru mais~ɕu kuŋ ɣi ulaqi kuiŋ rumakijas~ɕ kuiŋ ɣi kais~ɕunmu ima kas~ɕaunia maħa kuiŋ.
S.FORM: havunniam ru maisu kung gi ulaqi kuing rumakiyas kuing gi kaisunmu ima kasaunia maha kuing.
S.PHON: ħa*unniam ru mais~ɕu kuŋ ɣi ulaqi kuiŋ rumakijas~ɕ kuiŋ ɣi kais~ɕunmu ima kas~ɕaunia maħa kuiŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們刺了以後,我會害怕,因為我還是小孩,我爬樹因為我害怕,怕它過來咬我.

TRANSL.notes: We stabbed (it) and, because I was afraid as a kid, I climbed up a tree because I was afraid that it would come and bite me, I thought.

S.TRANSL: We stabbed and, because I was afraid as a kid, I climbed up a tree because I was afraid that it would come and bite me, I thought.

S.FORM: rumkiyas kung hani yaku babaan ku.
S.PHON: rumkijas~ɕ kuŋ ħani jaku βaβaan ku.
S.FORM: rumkiyas kung hani yaku babaan ku.
S.PHON: rumkijas~ɕ kuŋ ħani jaku βaβaan ku.

TRANSL.notes: 我爬樹,原來那棵樹是陷阱的一部分(木柱).

S.TRANSL: 我爬樹,原來那棵樹是陷阱的一部分 .
I climbed the tree, and it turned out that the tree was indeed the pole of the trap.

S.FORM: tuliq kasa'angun kung ni yava'mu nanuwan asigi isu ga taqaqutit hani ka rumakiyas su babaan la saannia muvaaq kuing agannia su vatunux.
S.PHON: tuliq kas~ɕaʔaŋun kuŋ ni ja*aʔmu nanuwan as~ɕiɣi is~ɕu ɣa taqaqutit ħani ka rumakijas~ɕ s~ɕu βaβaan la s~ɕaannia mu*aaq kuiŋ aɣannia s~ɕu *atunux.
S.FORM: tuliq kasa'angun kung ni yava'mu nanuwan asigi isu ga taqaqutit hani ka rumakiyas su babaan la saannia muvaaq kuing agannia su vatunux.
S.PHON: tuliq kas~ɕaʔaŋun kuŋ ni ja*aʔmu nanuwan as~ɕiɣi is~ɕu ɣa taqaqutit ħani ka rumakijas~ɕ s~ɕu βaβaan la s~ɕaannia mu*aaq kuiŋ aɣannia s~ɕu *atunux.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸就開始罵我,說他"怎麼會有像你這麼沒用的人,去爬那根柱子?" 他叫我下來,並拿起石頭.
My father started scolding me, saying "How come you are so useless, to climb that pole?" Asking me to descend, he grabbed a stone.

S.FORM: rarimania i aruwa havun su awlu la ru.
S.PHON: rarimania i aruwa ħa*un s~ɕu awlu la ru.
S.FORM: rarimania i aruwa havun su awlu la ru.
S.PHON: rarimania i aruwa ħa*un s~ɕu awlu la ru.
S.TRANSL: 先前他已經刺了山豬喉嚨.
He had already stabbed the hog into its throat.

S.FORM: tuliq ru tutingunnia su tunux ru mwah sami la.
S.PHON: tuliq ru tutiŋunnia s~ɕu tunux ru mwaħ s~ɕami la.
S.FORM: tuliq ru tutingunnia su tunux ru mwah sami la.
S.PHON: tuliq ru tutiŋunnia s~ɕu tunux ru mwaħ s~ɕami la.
S.TRANSL: 然後,爸爸他打了山豬的頭,然後我們就回來了.
And then, Father beat the hog on the head, and we came back.

S.FORM: pangania' sipapanga'nia kuing ru ini'mu papruyqi.
S.PHON: paŋaniaʔ s~ɕipapaŋaʔnia kuiŋ ru iniʔmu paprujqi.
S.FORM: pangania' sipapanga'nia kuing ru ini'mu papruyqi.
S.PHON: paŋaniaʔ s~ɕipapaŋaʔnia kuiŋ ru iniʔmu paprujqi.
S.TRANSL: 他叫我去揹,但是我揹不動.
He asked me to carry it on the back, but I just couldn't.

S.FORM: muah sami ru maki sami kaykian havag ku vaisnia' pakati'nia' suku qaqalapannaha.
S.PHON: muaħ s~ɕami ru maki s~ɕami kajkian ħa*aɣ ku *ais~ɕniaʔ pakatiʔniaʔ s~ɕuku qaqalapannaħa.
S.FORM: muah sami ru maki sami kaykian havag ku vaisnia' pakati'nia' suku qaqalapannaha.
S.PHON: muaħ s~ɕami ru maki s~ɕami kajkian ħa*aɣ ku *ais~ɕniaʔ pakatiʔniaʔ s~ɕuku qaqalapannaħa.

TRANSL.notes: 我們回來,然後我們在獵寮.(爸爸)他的同伴都把獵物丟到睡覺的地方(來炫耀).

S.TRANSL: 我們回來,然後我們在獵寮. 他的同伴都把獵物丟到睡覺的地方 .

TRANSL.notes: We came back, and we were at the hunting hut. All his fellow companions threw (the preys) to the place for rest (to show off).

S.TRANSL: We came back, and we were at the hunting hut. All his fellow companions threw to the place for rest .

S.FORM: apau akusu uw taruiqun la ku ra huwal sannaha ku.
S.PHON: apau akus~ɕu uw taruiqun la ku ra ħuwal s~ɕannaħa ku.
S.FORM: apau akusu uw taruiqun la ku ra huwal sannaha ku.
S.PHON: apau akus~ɕu uw taruiqun la ku ra ħuwal s~ɕannaħa ku.
S.TRANSL: 他們說,哇,原來你吊到很大的東西.
Wow, indeed you hung something big big, they said.

S.FORM: gulgulunia maqas kahavag la.
S.PHON: ɣulɣulunia maqas~ɕ kaħa*aɣ la.
S.FORM: gulgulunia maqas kahavag la.
S.PHON: ɣulɣulunia maqas~ɕ kaħa*aɣ la.
S.TRANSL: 他的同伴都很高興.
All his fellow companions were glad.

S.FORM: maqas la ru tiku tiqay ka quwau ka inarasnaha ga.
S.PHON: maqas~ɕ la ru tiku tiqaj ka quwau ka inaras~ɕnaħa ɣa.
S.FORM: maqas la ru tiku tiqay ka quwau ka inarasnaha ga.
S.PHON: maqas~ɕ la ru tiku tiqaj ka quwau ka inaras~ɕnaħa ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 高興以後,他們說帶的酒微不足道.

TRANSL.notes: (They) were happy and (they said) the liquor that they brought was minor.

S.TRANSL: were happy and the liquor that they brought was minor.

S.FORM: maqas la ru tiku tiqay ka quwau ka inarasnaha ga.
S.PHON: maqas~ɕ la ru tiku tiqaj ka quwau ka inaras~ɕnaħa ɣa.
S.FORM: maqas la ru tiku tiqay ka quwau ka inarasnaha ga.
S.PHON: maqas~ɕ la ru tiku tiqaj ka quwau ka inaras~ɕnaħa ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 高興以後,他們說帶的酒微不足道.

TRANSL.notes: (They) were happy and (they said) the liquor that they brought was minor.

S.TRANSL: were happy and the liquor that they brought was minor.

S.FORM: sihawnaha' sumayuk ku ruma'.
S.PHON: s~ɕiħawnaħaʔ s~ɕumajuk ku rumaʔ.
S.FORM: sihawnaha' sumayuk ku ruma'.
S.PHON: s~ɕiħawnaħaʔ s~ɕumajuk ku rumaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們倒酒給他後就燒山豬毛.

TRANSL.notes: They poured the liquor to him (the hog hunter), and they burned its hair.

S.TRANSL: They poured the liquor to him , and they burned its hair.

S.FORM: naqarun sumayuk hauvingunnaha'.
S.PHON: naqarun s~ɕumajuk ħau*iŋunnaħaʔ.
S.FORM: naqarun sumayuk hauvingunnaha'.
S.PHON: naqarun s~ɕumajuk ħau*iŋunnaħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 燒完毛後,他們就切山豬.
After burning off the hair of the hog, they cut it.

S.FORM: tiku hi ga siaras i suku ulaqi imuwag.
S.PHON: tiku ħi ɣa s~ɕiaras~ɕ i s~ɕuku ulaqi imuwaɣ.
S.FORM: tiku hi ga siaras i suku ulaqi imuwag.
S.PHON: tiku ħi ɣa s~ɕiaras~ɕ i s~ɕuku ulaqi imuwaɣ.
S.TRANSL: 肉要帶給家裡面的小孩.
The meat was intended to be taken to the children at home.

S.FORM: tiku giyus la ga tahkun kiya i ragiyax la ru.
S.PHON: tiku ɣijus~ɕ la ɣa taħkun kija i raɣijax la ru.
S.FORM: tiku giyus la ga tahkun kiya i ragiyax la ru.
S.PHON: tiku ɣijus~ɕ la ɣa taħkun kija i raɣijax la ru.
S.TRANSL: 內臟的部分就在山上煮.
The internal organs were cooked in the mountains.

S.FORM: tuliq ru masay la ku tinahuk la qasugunnaha' la ru.
S.PHON: tuliq ru mas~ɕaj la ku tinaħuk la qas~ɕuɣunnaħaʔ la ru.
S.FORM: tuliq ru masay la ku tinahuk la qasugunnaha' la ru.
S.PHON: tuliq ru mas~ɕaj la ku tinaħuk la qas~ɕuɣunnaħaʔ la ru.

TRANSL.notes: 然後,煮的東西已經熟了,他們就開始分(內臟).

S.TRANSL: 然後,煮的東西已經熟了,他們就開始分 .

TRANSL.notes: And then, the stuff became well-done, and they started to allocate (the internal organs).

S.TRANSL: And then, the stuff became well-done, and they started to allocate .

S.FORM: maniq sami su mami' la ru manuvuwag su quwaw ru maymaw pana'is ku nanavakis gi paqasunnaha' la.
S.PHON: maniq s~ɕami s~ɕu mamiʔ la ru manu*uwaɣ s~ɕu quwaw ru majmaw panaʔis~ɕ ku nana*akis~ɕ ɣi paqas~ɕunnaħaʔ la.
S.FORM: maniq sami su mami' la ru manuvuwag su quwaw ru maymaw pana'is ku nanavakis gi paqasunnaha' la.
S.PHON: maniq s~ɕami s~ɕu mamiʔ la ru manu*uwaɣ s~ɕu quwaw ru majmaw panaʔis~ɕ ku nana*akis~ɕ ɣi paqas~ɕunnaħaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 我們吃飯然後喝酒,然後老人們高興得開始唱歌,因為真的很開心.
We ate and then we drank the liquor, and the elders were so happy that they began to sing because they were really happy.

S.FORM: yani muwah sami ru.
S.PHON: jani muwaħ s~ɕami ru.
S.FORM: yani muwah sami ru.
S.PHON: jani muwaħ s~ɕami ru.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們就回來了.
And so we returned.

S.FORM: muwah sami imuwag ru.
S.PHON: muwaħ s~ɕami imuwaɣ ru.
S.FORM: muwah sami imuwag ru.
S.PHON: muwaħ s~ɕami imuwaɣ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們回到家.
We came home.

S.FORM: muwah i mapatisan imuwag makaal maha mausa'ta' i kanuwan ma ru.
S.PHON: muwaħ i mapatis~ɕan imuwaɣ makaal maħa maus~ɕaʔtaʔ i kanuwan ma ru.
S.FORM: muwah i mapatisan imuwag makaal maha mausa'ta' i kanuwan ma ru.
S.PHON: muwaħ i mapatis~ɕan imuwaɣ makaal maħa maus~ɕaʔtaʔ i kanuwan ma ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們回到家裡後相互聊天,討論說什麼時候要去.
We came back and chatted with each other at home, discussing when would be the next visit.

S.FORM: sumku su riax su ausa' naha' mitaal lawwi.
S.PHON: s~ɕumku s~ɕu riax s~ɕu aus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ mitaal lawwi.
S.FORM: sumku su riax su ausa' naha' mitaal lawwi.
S.PHON: s~ɕumku s~ɕu riax s~ɕu aus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ mitaal lawwi.
S.TRANSL: 訂下日子下次再去巡陷阱.

TRANSL.notes: (We) settled on the date and would check the trap again.

S.TRANSL: settled on the date and would check the trap again.

S.FORM: tuliq ru maka mapitu' ru halannaha' mitaal lawwi.
S.PHON: tuliq ru maka mapituʔ ru ħalannaħaʔ mitaal lawwi.
S.FORM: tuliq ru maka mapitu' ru halannaha' mitaal lawwi.
S.PHON: tuliq ru maka mapituʔ ru ħalannaħaʔ mitaal lawwi.
S.TRANSL: 然後,過了七天後他們又去看陷阱.
And then, seven days later, they went to check the trap again.

S.FORM: musa' sami lawwi ru gumru kung lawwi i yava'mu.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami lawwi ru ɣumru kuŋ lawwi i ja*aʔmu.
S.FORM: musa' sami lawwi ru gumru kung lawwi i yava'mu.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami lawwi ru ɣumru kuŋ lawwi i ja*aʔmu.
S.TRANSL: 我們又去一次,然後我又跟著爸爸去一次.
We went there again, and I followed Father there again.

S.FORM: tayhuk sami kiya qaat yani la ku tinruyqan taruyqunnia la hani tinruweq su para'.
S.PHON: tajħuk s~ɕami kija qaat jani la ku tinrujqan tarujqunnia la ħani tinruweq s~ɕu paraʔ.
S.FORM: tayhuk sami kiya qaat yani la ku tinruyqan taruyqunnia la hani tinruweq su para'.
S.PHON: tajħuk s~ɕami kija qaat jani la ku tinrujqan tarujqunnia la ħani tinruweq s~ɕu paraʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 我們到那邊(獵場),在新的地方又吊到東西,就在這邊吊到山羌.

S.TRANSL: 我們到那邊 ,在新的地方又吊到東西,就在這邊吊到山羌.

TRANSL.notes: We arrived there (the hunting area), and we had something hung at a new place, and it was one muntjac.

S.TRANSL: We arrived there , and we had something hung at a new place, and it was one muntjac.

S.FORM: alun alunmiam ku para' ru.
S.PHON: alun alunmiam ku paraʔ ru.
S.FORM: alun alunmiam ku para' ru.
S.PHON: alun alunmiam ku paraʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們就把山羌拿走.
We took away the muntjac.

S.FORM: tutingunniam ru alunniam.
S.PHON: tutiŋunniam ru alunniam.
S.FORM: tutingunniam ru alunniam.
S.PHON: tutiŋunniam ru alunniam.

TRANSL.notes: 我們打了(山羌)之後,我們就把它拿走了.

S.TRANSL: 我們打了 之後,我們就把它拿走了.

TRANSL.notes: We beat (the munjtac) and we took it away.

S.TRANSL: We beat and we took it away.

S.FORM: ru qutux suvalay ku para'miam.
S.PHON: ru qutux s~ɕu*alaj ku paraʔmiam.
S.FORM: ru qutux suvalay ku para'miam.
S.PHON: ru qutux s~ɕu*alaj ku paraʔmiam.
S.TRANSL: 我們只有獵到一隻山羌.
What we hunted was only one muntjac.

S.FORM: siqun sami kaykian kahavag ku minaglu saspat.
S.PHON: s~ɕiqun s~ɕami kajkian kaħa*aɣ ku minaɣlu s~ɕas~ɕpat.
S.FORM: siqun sami kaykian kahavag ku minaglu saspat.
S.PHON: s~ɕiqun s~ɕami kajkian kaħa*aɣ ku minaɣlu s~ɕas~ɕpat.
S.TRANSL: 四個人一起隨後在獵竂集合.
All the four of us gathered at the hunting hut.

S.FORM: ku navakis niannaha rasun qutux lawwi ku vawak.
S.PHON: ku na*akis~ɕ niannaħa ras~ɕun qutux lawwi ku *awak.
S.FORM: ku navakis niannaha rasun qutux lawwi ku vawak.
S.PHON: ku na*akis~ɕ niannaħa ras~ɕun qutux lawwi ku *awak.
S.TRANSL: 我看到老人們又帶一隻山豬回來.
I saw the elderly bring back a hog again.

S.FORM: tuliq ru sayukannaha' nanu' asi naku manaaling musa' ka.
S.PHON: tuliq ru s~ɕajukannaħaʔ nanuʔ as~ɕi naku manaaliŋ mus~ɕaʔ ka.
S.FORM: tuliq ru sayukannaha' nanu' asi naku manaaling musa' ka.
S.PHON: tuliq ru s~ɕajukannaħaʔ nanuʔ as~ɕi naku manaaliŋ mus~ɕaʔ ka.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們燒毛就像他們當初去打獵的樣子.
And then, they burned its hair just like when they went hunting.

S.FORM: sinuvuwagnaha' ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕinu*uwaɣnaħaʔ ru.
S.FORM: sinuvuwagnaha' ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕinu*uwaɣnaħaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們就為此喝酒.
They drank for this.

S.FORM: maqas ku inlungannaha'.
S.PHON: maqas~ɕ ku inluŋannaħaʔ.
S.FORM: maqas ku inlungannaha'.
S.PHON: maqas~ɕ ku inluŋannaħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們心裡很開心.
They were happy at heart.

S.FORM: gi muwani ku navakis sunga' i maqas inluangan ga ga manuvuwag tikay su quwaw ru manaqru' manuvuwag la ga mapanaquwas la panaquwas la ru kinsasan maqilap la ru kinsasannia' la ga sugagay sami la ru.
S.PHON: ɣi muwani ku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ i maqas~ɕ inluaŋan ɣa ɣa manu*uwaɣ tikaj s~ɕu quwaw ru manaqruʔ manu*uwaɣ la ɣa mapanaquwas~ɕ la panaquwas~ɕ la ru kins~ɕas~ɕan maqilap la ru kins~ɕas~ɕanniaʔ la ɣa s~ɕuɣaɣaj s~ɕami la ru.
S.FORM: gi muwani ku navakis sunga' i maqas inluangan ga ga manuvuwag tikay su quwaw ru manaqru' manuvuwag la ga mapanaquwas la panaquwas la ru kinsasan maqilap la ru kinsasannia' la ga sugagay sami la ru.
S.PHON: ɣi muwani ku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ i maqas~ɕ inluaŋan ɣa ɣa manu*uwaɣ tikaj s~ɕu quwaw ru manaqruʔ manu*uwaɣ la ɣa mapanaquwas~ɕ la panaquwas~ɕ la ru kins~ɕas~ɕan maqilap la ru kins~ɕas~ɕanniaʔ la ɣa s~ɕuɣaɣaj s~ɕami la ru.
S.TRANSL: 因為以前老人就是這樣,如果心裡高興的話,就會喝一點酒.喝完了酒,就會一直唱歌和睡覺直到第二天來臨,然後我們就分開.

TRANSL.notes: The reason is that, in the past, the elders were like this. If they were happy at heart, they drank a little liquor. After that, (they) would keep singing and sleep until the next day. We did not part until the following day.

S.TRANSL: The reason is that, in the past, the elders were like this. If they were happy at heart, they drank a little liquor. After that, would keep singing and sleep until the next day. We did not part until the following day.

S.FORM: paqusanmu i naka'ava'mu maha u suwa' ka raramat nanak ku.
S.PHON: paqus~ɕanmu i nakaʔa*aʔmu maħa u s~ɕuwaʔ ka raramat nanak ku.
S.FORM: paqusanmu i naka'ava'mu maha u suwa' ka raramat nanak ku.
S.PHON: paqus~ɕanmu i nakaʔa*aʔmu maħa u s~ɕuwaʔ ka raramat nanak ku.
S.TRANSL: 我就問死去的爸爸說,為什麼只有菜而已.
I asked my late father why there was only meat to eat.

S.FORM: hanta' kumiyum ukas tiqay a vuwax san la.
S.PHON: ħantaʔ kumijum ukas~ɕ tiqaj a *uwax s~ɕan la.
S.FORM: hanta' kumiyum ukas tiqay a vuwax san la.
S.PHON: ħantaʔ kumijum ukas~ɕ tiqaj a *uwax s~ɕan la.

TRANSL.notes: 我們去找一找之後,(對爸爸)說為什麼沒有米.

S.TRANSL: 我們去找一找之後, 說為什麼沒有米.
We went searching, and I asked: "Why was there no rice?"

S.FORM: vali ukas a sayi' ru vunga' ga kiya kahavaw ku naniqunta' ramatanay ta su sayi' ga maha i.
S.PHON: *ali ukas~ɕ a s~ɕajiʔ ru *uŋaʔ ɣa kija kaħa*aw ku naniquntaʔ ramatanaj ta s~ɕu s~ɕajiʔ ɣa maħa i.
S.FORM: vali ukas a sayi' ru vunga' ga kiya kahavaw ku naniqunta' ramatanay ta su sayi' ga maha i.
S.PHON: *ali ukas~ɕ a s~ɕajiʔ ru *uŋaʔ ɣa kija kaħa*aw ku naniquntaʔ ramatanaj ta s~ɕu s~ɕajiʔ ɣa maħa i.

TRANSL.notes: (爸爸說)不是沒有芋頭和地瓜,因為我們有很多食物,我們要用芋頭來配(肉).

S.TRANSL: 不是沒有芋頭和地瓜,因為我們有很多食物,我們要用芋頭來配 .

TRANSL.notes: It was not without taros and sweet potatoes because we had to pair the meat with taros, (Father) said. We had a lot of food, and we had to pair it with meat.

S.TRANSL: It was not without taros and sweet potatoes because we had to pair the meat with taros, said. We had a lot of food, and we had to pair it with meat.

S.FORM: ku nanavakis sunga' ru atu' na valayq valay ku qinqiyanux naku nanavakis sunga'.
S.PHON: ku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru atuʔ na *alajq *alaj ku qinqijanux naku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: ku nanavakis sunga' ru atu' na valayq valay ku qinqiyanux naku nanavakis sunga'.
S.PHON: ku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru atuʔ na *alajq *alaj ku qinqijanux naku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 以前老人們的生活真的很好.
In the past the life of the elderly were really nice.

S.FORM: ana i ukas a luwan naku navakis sunga' ga ana tiqay ku luwannaha' ga paqasunnaha' suvalay ukas ku ku inluangannaha' ka makis suku inluangannaha' maha u nanuwan ku si'anakuxta'.
S.PHON: ana i ukas~ɕ a luwan naku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa ana tiqaj ku luwannaħaʔ ɣa paqas~ɕunnaħaʔ s~ɕu*alaj ukas~ɕ ku ku inluaŋannaħaʔ ka makis~ɕ s~ɕuku inluaŋannaħaʔ maħa u nanuwan ku s~ɕiʔanakuxtaʔ.
S.FORM: ana i ukas a luwan naku navakis sunga' ga ana tiqay ku luwannaha' ga paqasunnaha' suvalay ukas ku ku inluangannaha' ka makis suku inluangannaha' maha u nanuwan ku si'anakuxta'.
S.PHON: ana i ukas~ɕ a luwan naku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa ana tiqaj ku luwannaħaʔ ɣa paqas~ɕunnaħaʔ s~ɕu*alaj ukas~ɕ ku ku inluaŋannaħaʔ ka makis~ɕ s~ɕuku inluaŋannaħaʔ maħa u nanuwan ku s~ɕiʔanakuxtaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 就算沒有收穫東西很少,他們也很開心.他們心裡在不覺得說有什麼要擔心的.
Though they had no gains, they were still happy. At their heart, they did not think that they had things to worry about.

S.FORM: maniq ku navakis hiya' la ga paqasunnaha' vali asi naku citay hani ka payux a vavayqan su pila' ru.
S.PHON: maniq ku na*akis~ɕ ħijaʔ la ɣa paqas~ɕunnaħaʔ *ali as~ɕi naku ʦ~ʨitaj ħani ka pajux a *a*ajqan s~ɕu pilaʔ ru.
S.FORM: maniq ku navakis hiya' la ga paqasunnaha' vali asi naku citay hani ka payux a vavayqan su pila' ru.
S.PHON: maniq ku na*akis~ɕ ħijaʔ la ɣa paqas~ɕunnaħaʔ *ali as~ɕi naku ʦ~ʨitaj ħani ka pajux a *a*ajqan s~ɕu pilaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 老人家有得吃的話,他們就很開心,也不會像這個時代一樣,有很多東西要給錢.
If the elders had things to eat, they were happy. It was not like this era when many things demand money.

S.FORM: payux usalan na pila' ru.
S.PHON: pajux us~ɕalan na pilaʔ ru.
S.FORM: payux usalan na pila' ru.
S.PHON: pajux us~ɕalan na pilaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 錢的去處很多.
There are many places where money can be spent.

S.FORM: savak maqiyanux i.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*ak maqijanux i.
S.FORM: savak maqiyanux i.
S.PHON: s~ɕa*ak maqijanux i.
S.TRANSL: 生活負擔很重.
The burden of life is heavy.

S.FORM: kumiyum payux ku si'anakux uwi paviru' ku ruma' ru anananuwan ga vayqan ru.
S.PHON: kumijum pajux ku s~ɕiʔanakux uwi pa*iruʔ ku rumaʔ ru anananuwan ɣa *ajqan ru.
S.FORM: kumiyum payux ku si'anakux uwi paviru' ku ruma' ru anananuwan ga vayqan ru.
S.PHON: kumijum pajux ku s~ɕiʔanakux uwi pa*iruʔ ku rumaʔ ru anananuwan ɣa *ajqan ru.

TRANSL.notes: 我們找錢(賺錢)也擔心很多事,像讀書或是其他的事,不管什麼東西都要錢.

S.TRANSL: 我們找錢 也擔心很多事,像讀書或是其他的事,不管什麼東西都要錢.

TRANSL.notes: (We) search (for money) and also worry a lot as well, like study or something else, and no matter what we need we have to pay.

S.TRANSL: search and also worry a lot as well, like study or something else, and no matter what we need we have to pay.

S.FORM: sipanaspungmu kinqyanux naku citay sunga' kinku hani ga valayq tiqay ku kinqayanux naku navakis sunga' hiya' bijiawtancun ku kinqiyanux naku navakis sunga' ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕipanas~ɕpuŋmu kinqjanux naku ʦ~ʨitaj s~ɕuŋaʔ kinku ħani ɣa *alajq tiqaj ku kinqajanux naku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ βijiawtanʦ~ʨun ku kinqijanux naku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru.
S.FORM: sipanaspungmu kinqyanux naku citay sunga' kinku hani ga valayq tiqay ku kinqayanux naku navakis sunga' hiya' bijiawtancun ku kinqiyanux naku navakis sunga' ru.
S.PHON: s~ɕipanas~ɕpuŋmu kinqjanux naku ʦ~ʨitaj s~ɕuŋaʔ kinku ħani ɣa *alajq tiqaj ku kinqajanux naku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ βijiawtanʦ~ʨun ku kinqijanux naku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我比較以前和現在的生活,以前老人的生活比較好一點,因為以前老人的生活比較單純.

TRANSL.notes: I compare the past era with the present, and I think that the elderly had life a little better (than now) in the past, because their life was simple.

S.TRANSL: I compare the past era with the present, and I think that the elderly had life a little better in the past, because their life was simple.

S.FORM: nanu' asigi ini'ta' ungiyi ku gaga' naku nanavakis sunga' maha ku inlunganmu.
S.PHON: nanuʔ as~ɕiɣi iniʔtaʔ uŋiji ku ɣaɣaʔ naku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ maħa ku inluŋanmu.
S.FORM: nanu' asigi ini'ta' ungiyi ku gaga' naku nanavakis sunga' maha ku inlunganmu.
S.PHON: nanuʔ as~ɕiɣi iniʔtaʔ uŋiji ku ɣaɣaʔ naku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ maħa ku inluŋanmu.
S.TRANSL: 我的心裡覺得,我們不該忘記以前老人們的規矩.
I felt at heart that we should not forget the rule of the elderly.

S.FORM: a siesie.
S.PHON: a s~ɕies~ɕie.
S.FORM: a siesie.
S.PHON: a s~ɕies~ɕie.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝.
Thanks.
